name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-server
description: MemberJunction: Server-tier coordination + execution for Realtime Bridges — completes the unified media-transport seam (the bridge ↔ IRealtimeSession pipe), bot-session lifecycle, host affinity + janitor, participant tracking, and turn-taking integration. Mirrors the AIEngineBase/AIEngine pair.
author: MemberJunction.com
//optionalDependencies: @microsoft/microsoft-graph-client and googleapis are OPTIONAL PEER SDKs (CLAUDE rule 8, category 2): this package never statically imports either. They back the calendar + identity-provisioner seams only. GraphCalendarSource/GraphAdmin provisioning wire IGraphCalendarLike/IGraphAdminLike over @microsoft/microsoft-graph-client (calendarView delta + POST /users); GoogleCalendarSource/Google Workspace provisioning wire IGoogleCalendarLike/IGoogleWorkspaceAdminLike over googleapis (calendar.events.list syncToken + admin.users.insert). The telephony-carrier number-order path is injected via ITelephonyCarrierLike (the carrier SDK is declared by each telephony provider package, not here). All surfaces are injected behind structural interfaces so the package builds + unit-tests with no install and no network, and are loaded only when a Graph/Google-backed identity is configured at deployment.
